title: Inscryption
description: A resource pack that adapts the gameplay of the game Inscryption for Minecraft
body:
![inscryption](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u0um1lZ0/images/95f4a00e5902595d58a38ce7288d321ebc52e624.png 'preview')

---

This resource pack adapts the gameplay of the legendary game "Inscryption" to minecraft, nothing more. 
### **OPTIFINE REQUIRED!**

---

Better use it with a mod RP Renames (https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)
